description_long: This humanoid robot features a sleek, angular design with a predominantly black and blue color scheme. Its body is composed of sharp, geometric panels that suggest a lightweight yet durable construction, likely using advanced composites or metals. The limbs are long and slender, with a pronounced tapering that gives the robot an agile, dynamic appearance. There are no visible facial features or expressive elements, and the head is integrated smoothly into the upper torso. The surface finish is glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the robot's modern, high-tech aesthetic. No external sensors, joints, or interactive components are clearly visible, giving the robot a minimalist and streamlined look.
description: A sleek, angular humanoid robot with long, slender limbs and a glossy black and blue finish. The design is minimalist, with no visible facial features or external sensors.
description_view_0: This view highlights the upper torso and part of the arm, showing the sharp, angular black and blue panels.
description_view_1: This view is mostly empty, with only a small portion of the robot's limb visible in the upper right corner.
description_view_2: This view shows the long, slender limb extending diagonally, emphasizing the robot's tapered design.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the lower torso and limb, with the glossy black and blue surfaces prominently visible.
attribute_pose: The robot is in a neutral, upright pose with limbs extended and slightly angled away from the body. The arms and legs are straight, and the torso is elongated.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, featuring only integrated black and blue panels as part of its body structure.
attribute_facial_features: No facial features are visible; the head is smooth and integrated with the torso, lacking eyes, mouth, or expressive elements.
attribute_limb_articulation: No visible joints or articulation points are present; limbs appear rigid and seamlessly connected to the torso.
